**What does this PR do?**
A one-line summary.

**Related issue**
Closes #

**If you added a tool / plugin**
- [ ] Created `internal/plugins/<tool>/<tool>.go` implementing the `Plugin` interface
- [ ] Registered it in `internal/app/registry.go`
- [ ] Added a test that parses real `--version` (or list) output

**Checklist**
- [ ] `go build ./...` passes
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] Changes are focused and match the surrounding code style
